reviews.name: Jerry Edmonds
reviews.text:
Rob, David, and the crew did a great job on our roof. They were prompt and courteous, and completed the job in one day. Cleanup was thorough-I haven't yet seen a single stray nail anywhere on my property.

I had a bad flat roofing job done a few years ago that constantly leaked when it rained. Rob modified the transition from shingle to flat roof that will prevent leaks and in fact has, as we have already had rain since the job was finished and everything is dry.

The whole process from quote to finished roof was seamless and easy. I highly recommend Rob and Roof Monsters for all of your roofing needs!

reviews.name: David Saren
reviews.text: Rob and his team have done several roof repairs form me over the years and each time quickly and accurately diagnosed and fixed the problems at reasonable cost.  Roof Monsters just completed a full shingle and flat deck replacement. They overcame supply challenges, intense heat, and a challenging roof design, while finishing a day ahead of schedule and cleaning the job site professionally.  Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Marya Morrison
reviews.text: Monster Roof -Rob has done excellent work at many of my investment properties and personal home he’s my goto roofer. Thank you for your assistance and competence as well as excellent pricing and best quality work. I will never use anyone else by far the very best roofer in Pinellas and Hillsbrough. Super conscientious and clean work sights! Thank you Rob!!

reviews.name: Tim Bradshaw
reviews.text:
These guys are terrific. They were punctual, thorough, and economical. They cleaned up their mess. They use the same crew for every job. That's important for quality work. After they left, Statewide Inspections did the 4 point wind mitigation inspection and Roof Monsters passed with flying colors. They went that extra step to make my home hurricane proof. I wouldn't hesitate to call them for all my roofing needs. Timothy Bradshaw & Charlie
PS: They loved Charlie

reviews.name: Mary Paxton
reviews.text: Roof Monster a fabulous roofing company had my roof done yesterday very polite, very very reasonable, fast working I would definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Sharon Herman
reviews.text: Rob came out on time and replaced our missing shingles. He’s friendly, professional and a pleasure to chat with.

reviews.name: William Smith
reviews.text: Rob came out to the house the next day after calling. We discussed the issues we were having, he found the leak in the roof and did a temp patch on the roof until they could come out and do the complete repair. His team was professional and made sure everything was cleaned up during and after the roof replacement. Would recommend to anyone that has roofing needs.

reviews.name: Diana Andonian
reviews.text: Rob came out the same day as my call.  He found my issue immediately.  Even though it wasn't a roof issue, he helped with a temporary fix and recommended someone to help me.  I would definitely recommend him to anyone.  Quick to respond, friendly and fair.  Thank you!

reviews.name: John Weston
reviews.text: I have done business with Terrance McKeever roofing for years. They have always done excellent work with fair prices. I have referred them to family and friends for over 30 years. We have never had a bad experience.

reviews.name: Jackie Capo
reviews.text:
Thank you all.
What an amazing job and finished it in noi time. Friendly and courteous.  Made sure everything was cleaned up afterwards

reviews.name: Sue Hoover
reviews.text: Terrance McKeever Roofing replaced my roof, soffits and facia. Rob Lewis and crew were absolutely fabulous!  Rob is one of the best communicators there is and kept me apprised every step of the way. I highly recommend Rob and his crew!

reviews.name: David Happe
reviews.text: Terrance McKeever Roofing Is at my place right now. They found a hard to find tile to match my discontinued tiles on my roof and within a week is over here completing the installation. Polite guy and exceptionally knowledgeable with good prices. All is well. Highly recommended.
